item.name: Greatsword Snook
item.description:
A king among swordspine snook, and lord of the waters of Oinops.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 3 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This prodigious and particularly keen snook has given rise to rumor that Studium pupils loosed a misguided attempt at autonomous weaponry into Sharlayan's streams, where it now lurks in wait for the toes of unwary bathers. While this estimation of students' propensity to engage in dangerous experiments “for science” is not inaccurate, the fish is mostly harmless.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
